markdown:
#  Can I edit or delete a commitment after its been synced with an integrated ERP system? 
##  Answer 
Yes. You can edit and delete synced commitments. However, it does require extra steps:
  * **Edit a Synced Commitment  
** Yes, you can edit a commitment after it has been synced with your company's Integrated ERP System. However, it requires a few extra steps. See [Edit a Commitment Synced with an Integrated ERP System](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/edit-a-commitment-synced-with-an-integrated-erp-system).
  * **Delete a Synced Commitment  
** Yes. You can delete a commitment in Procore after it has been synced with your company's integrated ERP system. However, it requires a few extra steps. See [Unlink Commitments Synced with ERP](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/unlink-commitments-synced-with-erp).


## See Also
  * [What do I do when a commitment fails to export from the ERP Integrations tool?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-do-i-do-when-a-commimtment-fails-to-export-from-the-erp-integrations-tool)
  * [Why is my Procore project missing from the ERP Integrations tool?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-why-is-my-procore-project-missing-from-the-erp-integrations-tool)
  * [What is the accounting approver role?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-accounting-approver-role)


In Procore, the term _integrated ERP System_ , is used to refer to _Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP)_ software applications that can be configured to exchange data between Procore and a supported application using the Company level ERP Integrations tool. See [Which ERP integrations are supported by Procore?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-erp-integrations-are-supported-by-procore)
title: Can I edit or delete a commitment after its been synced with an integrated ERP system?
description: Explains the additional steps to take if you want to delete a commitment after it's been synced with Procore + ERP Integrations.
